feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How can I remove the branch code from the sales order?
entry.content:
How can I remove the branch code from the sales order? I don't need this field and I can't find where to set it.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Reclassification with "Regroup Receivables / Payables"
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm dealing with a subject I'm not familiar with : the reclassification of Accounts Payable (G/L account 40000000) to Accounts Payables for Fixed Asssets (G/L account 40500000)

I wonder if tile "Regroup Receivable / Payables" is the one that suites the best for this process or if it exists an other process/tile specific for Fixed Assets ?



What precautions should be taken before proceeding with the reclassification of Accounts Payable to Accounts Payables for Fixed Asssets ?

Thank you for your help ?

Erwan

entry.title: How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dears,

As it is in subject - How to restrict access to view of supplier invoices in S4Hana Public Cloud ?

For purpose:

Persons on B2B contract - they can't see each other's invoices in Supplier Invoice List app. 

Both person will be in the same Company Code, in the same Purchasing Group. Only difference will be in Cost Center.

How can we avoid this kind of situations ? 

Which attribute can limit this?

Regards

entry.title: In BOM, long text is only saved when there are 3 or more lines
entry.content:
We need to maintain long text fields in the BOM app Change Bill of Material ( App Id CS02 ) But when the long text is less than 3 lines, the information will be automatically stored on lines 1 and 2 and we get the popup 'Item long text only saved if there are 3 lines or more '.

 

This does not meet our business needs. We only need to store the value in the long text field.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Backups in S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

 

Is it possible to obtain company code–wise backups in S/4HANA Cloud?

If this is feasible, how to download such backups?

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts field in SO
entry.content:
I would like to get this field in SO via CDS views.

 

Is there any CDS views which include Deliv.Rel. Billg Sts field?

Best Regards,

Khaing Zin

entry.title: Modify existing custom Fiori App
entry.content:
There is an already existing custom Fiori app using RAP deployed in the system (S4HPCE). I have a requirement to modify the UI by adding custom action. Previous developer dont have a copy of the BAS project.

My question is how can I load the project into BAS so I can modify the app and deploy?

entry.title: Extracting Data Through CDS Views to SAP BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello there lovely SAP Community, 

Id like to integrate SAP BW/4HANA with S/4 hana public cloud and found the following todo on the s/4 hana public cloud platform: 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/c0c54048d35849128be8e872df5bea6d/7d2bae1d9f2643c3bbaa398df8256c01.html?locale=en-US

According to this Guide i have to Create a Communication Arrangement with the ID: "SAP_COM_0042". Unfortunatly this Arrangement is unavaiable for me. I also dont find it in api.sap.com , nor any further information. 

My Question: What scope item does the communication Arrangement "SAP_COM_0042" comes along with? Or do i miss any point? Is there a better integration guide that i have missed? 

 

Thanks a lot for your support!

 

Kind regards, 

Philipp

entry.title: How to add data (z table) in SAP Public cloud Customizing tenant?
entry.content:
Hi team,

How to add data (z table) in SAP Public cloud Customizing tenant?

 

Thanks,

Nirojan.

entry.title: Error with transporting assignment of BP Identification Category to Identification Type
entry.content:
Dear Community,

in our Public Cloud Implementation Project, we would like to assign a customized Business Partner Identification Category to a BP Identification Type.

Identification Categories have been customized. Transport from customizing to test system in public cloud has been done via Export Software Collection. By releasing the software collection in its specific app, the transport is immediately available in the test system and ready to be imported.

Afterwards, we assign the Identification Category to an Identification Type. This setting has to be stored in a customizing transport.  Subsequently, the customizing transport has to be released in order to transport it to the test system. This is not working due to dependencies to the settings, that had to be stored in the software collection.

 

Does anyone of you know how to overcome the issue? A Ticket has already been raised.

 

Many thanks in advance and kind regards

Talke

entry.title: Deploying a Fiori Adaption Project application to the Fiori launchpad in public cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

for a customer project, we need to modify a standard fiori application (doubtful account validation), and deploy it to the public cloud. Currently i try to deploy the application without changes, because i want to have a working deployment process, before i change things in the app.

For the deployment i followed a tutorial that seems to fit my needs:
Link 

My deployment settings in BAS look different. So i was not able to adjust everything what was mentioned in the tutorial.

When i try to select the app in the PC in the "manage launchpad space" transaction, i simply cannot select it.

Has anyone experience in doing adaption projects and public cloud deployments?

Thanks in advance !

entry.title: #COE#RFL01 VAT refund XML file for Belgium
entry.content:
Hello,

In the EU and in certain conditions, a company can ask for a refund of VAT paid to another member of EU.

The conditions are explained in:

  •  Directive 2008/9/EC
  • Update with :  Implementing Regulation 79/2012

Each country has a portal to declare invoice and VAT to refund.

I actually work for a Belgian company and Belgium use portal “Intervat”.
https://finance.belgium.be/en/taxpayers-established-in-belgium-foreign-vat-refund

In Intervat there are two ways to declare a refund:

  • Populate it manually
  • Upload an xml file

Xml file structured is explained with an XSD file “NewVatRefund-in_v0_9.xsd”
https://finances.belgium.be/fr/E-services/Intervat/documentation-technique

I searched for a way in SAP to generate this XML, but I am not sure that SAP is compliant.

I always look at some customizing points and apps.

SCCUI 103491 is used to declare Tax code to refund.

To add information of “expense” code we can use SCCUI 103490 or 103492.

App “VAT refund (UE)” create an overview of the FI documents that are relevant to VAT refund. Select “Create Reporting Portfolio” allowed to use app “Prepare Electronic Tax return”.

And in app “Prepare Electronic Tax Return” we can select a return type “0003 – VAT refund” and, for me, that should permit to create the XML file that Intervat need.

Do we agree or not ?

If SAP is not compliant, there is another way in SAP Public Cloud (2-landsape) to generate this XML file ?

Best regards,

Teddy.

#COE#RFL01

entry.title: Recommended Approach for Check Printing in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud (SDDW Replacement)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

We’re implementing SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and currently use a legacy check writing tool (SDDW) to handle:

  • Physical check printing with MICR lines

  • Positive Pay file uploads to banks

  • Secure assignment of check numbers and tracking of voided/reprinted checks

  • Remittance data formatted within the check layout

We’re now looking to align this process with our SAP Public Cloud deployment.

Does SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud offer any native functionality or recommended approaches for handling these requirements?
Are there specific apps, configuration steps, or certified third-party tools commonly used for this?

Appreciate any insights from others who’ve handled similar scenarios or modernized this process.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: #COE#RFL01 VAT refund XML file for Belgium
entry.content:
Hello @Teddy_CARVALHO 

thank you for reaching out in the SAP Community. 

You can find information about VAT Return runs for Belgium in the SAP Help Portal here. You can also define the output layout in the Prepare Electronic Tax Return app as described in this Help topic. 

I hope this helps.

Best regards,

Anja

entry.title: what is the retention period for the job logs in application job application?
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We plan to utilize the Application Job feature to execute standard jobs within the system.

Could you please let us know what is the retention period of the spool and the log of standard job?

Thanks

entry.title: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place?
entry.content:
Dear Community,
for testing different pricing strategies in purchasing (Public Cloud), I have created a variant condition in the purchasing info record. To test my custom condition type, I have set the deletion flag for the previously created variant condition. Now I would like to reactivate this same variant condition, however, I cannot untick deletion indicator (as expected) but I also cannot create a second line with the same Material/Variant/Validity combo. Clicking on F1 for the deletion indicator, it gives me the following information: 

My questions is: What is the reorganization run and when does it take place? Can I somehow trigger the run manually, so that I can re-create my variant condition?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Business catalog SAP_FIN_BC_GL_REPORTING_DE_PC is missing
entry.content:
The business catalog for General Ledger Reporting for PERSON_NAME (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_REPORTING_DE_PC ) is missing in the role template General Ledger Accountant.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Get trail mail for audit log of BOM in S4HC?
entry.content:
We need audit trails for the internal audit team. And one of the requirement is change log for BOM's.
Kindly let us know how this dump can be accessed?

*Note - Change versions for BOM are not maintained


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: GR/IR Clearing Open Items - Manual postings to GR/IR accounts aren't allowed.
entry.content:
GR/IR Clearing Open Items.

the GR/IR GL is made into non automatic posting account, within GL master. For the manual entry posting to clearing the GR/IR open item which are related to the previous year.

When I tried posting the manual entry to GR/IR account it is not allowing to make entry by showing the below error.

Using app Post General Journal Entries for GR/IR Clearing account Error Manual postings to GR/IR accounts aren't allowed.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Display Original Duplicate Triplicate on Delivery challan output form
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm working with Adobe Forms in S/4HANA Public Cloud, we developed delivery challan output form in such a way that

when we click on preview we have to get four copies . It was done.

And now client requirement is we have to display as

 

  • Original on first copy

  • Duplicate on second copy

  • Triplicate on third copy

  • Extra Copy on fourth copy

Note :  I have placed header and footer part in master page.

How can i do this . please guide me.

Thanks

Sarat.
